seo.keywords: Annamalai, Yuvan Yuvathi, Vijay Antony, Haricharan, 24 Hours full lyrics, Yuvan Yuvathi songs lyrics, 24 Hours lyrics snippets, 24 Hours WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share 24 Hours lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of the song 24 Hours from the movie Yuvan Yuvathi, featuring the melodious voice of Haricharan. Composed by the talented Vijay Antony, this track combines rhythmic beats with catchy lyrics by Annamalai. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly encapsulates youthful exuberance and modern vibes.
stanzaMeanings: Hands up everybody, hands up - hey! Hands up everybody, hands up.
Come and dance, you dance when you hear the music, put your hands up. Are you steady? Put your hands up. Everybody, put your hands up.

Hey... 24 hours, it's not enough for life. When we see America, our place doesn't feel good. This beautiful world is shaking, the excitement is rising. Even if you lift your spirits, their dance won't stop.
Hands up everybody, hands up - hey! Hands up everybody, hands up.
The season that seeks joy, the beauty of women. Their hearts are like time bombs. Life here is a struggle, we don't want to lose. Without light, there's no connection, again and again it's night.
Hands up everybody, hands up... 24 hours, it's not enough for life. When we see America, our place doesn't feel good. Hey...
Drink coffee, you sing a song, you make it pleasing to the heart. Take it, the sky is ready. Get ready.
Hands up everybody, hands up... Life is a blessing, the heart dances. Every day is a day of prosperity. A heart is just an empty place. It seeks happiness even in a small way.
Yesterday and tomorrow are all dreams, today is just passing by. In these days, we can't waste our time. Don't delay your job.
24 hours... Hands up everybody, hands up... Hands up everybody, hands up - hey! Hands up everybody, hands up.
With a platinum smile, the eyes sparkle. In the gaze, the head spins. The light of the moon, it creates waves, waves that take life away.
With a broken heart, the pain is heavy. Silence is a barrier to desire. In the eyes, there are hidden secrets.
When flowers bloom, the beauty is seen, the eyes are filled with tears. Even if it's enough, it will grow. Like a mustache, desire is blue.
24 hours, it's not enough for life. When we see America, our place doesn't feel good. This beautiful world is shaking, the excitement is rising. Even if you lift your spirits, their dance won't stop.
Hands up everybody, hands up - hey! Hands up everybody, hands up.
enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song '24 Hours'?

The song conveys a lively and energetic vibe, encouraging listeners to dance and enjoy the moment.

Who is the singer of '24 Hours'?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan.

What movie is '24 Hours' from?

'24 Hours' is from the movie Yuvan Yuvathi, released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song '24 Hours' from the movie Yuvan Yuvathi, Vijay Antony and Samantha Ruth Prabhu bring a vibrant energy that resonates with the audience. The upbeat and danceable rhythm encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy life. This track perfectly captures the celebratory spirit of the film, making it a favorite for parties and gatherings. With Haricharan's engaging vocals, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement.
